§6Matter Condenser§f:
The §6Matter Condenser §f(appliedenergistics2:condenser) is a §especialty processing block §f that §bconverts excess items into §6Matter Balls§f, §6Singularities §f, and ultimately §6Singularity §fitems. It is the foundation of the §6Singularity crafting §f system and the §6Matter Cannon §f ammo path.

§6Production Path (network/blocks/io_condenser.json)§f:
Pattern "aba / bcb / aba":
- §ba§f: §6Iron Ingot §f(ingotIron) — 4 (corners)
- §bb§f: §6Glass §f(any of the §6#appliedenergistics2:quartz_glass §foredict tag) — 4 (mid edges)
- §cc§f: §6Fluix Dust §f(dustFluix) — 1 (centre)
- Yields 1× Matter Condenser

§6Function (BlockCondenser.java)§f:
- §bItem-to-matter conversion §f: place items in the §6top §f or §6sides §f of the Condenser; it compresses them into §6Matter Balls §f
- §bMatter Balls §f: 256 of any item → 1× §6Matter Ball §f
- §bSingularities §f: 256× §6Matter Balls §f → 1× §6Singularity §f of the original item
- §bPower draw §f: §b1 AE/t §f at idle, scales with conversion rate
- §bStorage slots §f: §b63 §f slots for items being processed
- §bAutomation §f: an §6Import Bus §f feeds the Condenser, an §6Export Bus §f extracts the output

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Matter Condenser is a component of, but it is referenced in 890 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bSingularity crafting §f: the §6Singularity §f is the most compressed storage in AE2
- §bMatter Cannon ammo §f: a Singularity feeds the §6Matter Cannon §f
- §bRecycling §f: scrap items back into reusable raw matter

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: connect a §6ME Interface §f to the Condenser to feed it with the §6network's overflow §f, then export the Matter Balls back into the network
- §eTip§f: the Condenser is §cnot §f efficient for §bcommon items §f with §bvastly different §f OreDict equivalents — keep an eye on the §6item type §f
- §cWarning§f: a Matter Condenser will §cdestroy §f items that have §bNBT data §f unless a §6Storage Bus §f preserves it
- §cWarning§f: a Singularity is §cbound §f to the specific item type; a §6Diamond Singularity §f cannot be converted to an §6Emerald Singularity §f
